mean_en: a book, especially one for children, that is published once a year, with the same title each time, but different contents; any plant that grows and dies within one year or season
sentence: Our company has seen a rise in annual revenues in recent years.
sentence_trans: 近年来，我们公司的年收入不断增加。
word_etyma: ann一年 + ual…的 → annual一年一度的
